scripts.ci:validate: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && node scripts/check-docs.mjs && pnpm build && pnpm pack:check && node scripts/publish-smoke.mjs
scripts.lint: pnpm exec biome check --config-path packages/config-biome/biome.json package.json scripts && turbo run lint
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm exec biome check --write --unsafe --config-path packages/config-biome/biome.json package.json scripts && turbo run lint -- --write
